infobox.key: Republic of Texas Biker Rally (R. O. T Biker Rally)
infobox.value: is a large [motorcycle rally](/wiki/Motorcycle_rally "Motorcycle rally") in [Texas](/wiki/Texas "Texas") and the largest turnstile (ticketed admission) motorcycle rally in the United States. Similar events in Sturgis, South Dakota, and Daytona Beach, Florida, draw more attendees, but they are not ticketed events. A simple majority of attendees arrive on Harley-Davidson motorcycles, but the rally is open to everyone and all brands of bikes. Many attendees arrive in motor homes and stay on the premises.[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*]

["Governor Rick Perry and Texas Custom Choppers Lead the 13th Annual ROT Rally Parade"](http://texascustomchoppers.biz/governor-rick-perry-and-texas-custom-choppers-lead-the-13th-annual-rot-rally-parade). Texas Custom Choppers. From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

| Republic of Texas Biker Rally | |
| --- | --- |
| Motorcycles parked under the Texas Capitol building in 2006 | |
| Genre | [Motorcycle rally](/wiki/Motorcycle_rally "Motorcycle rally") |
| Date | Near [Memorial Day](/wiki/Memorial_Day "Memorial Day") |
| Frequency | Annual |
| Location | [Austin, Texas](/wiki/Austin,_Texas "Austin, Texas") |
| Inaugurated | 1995 |
| Attendance | 35,000 tickets 200,000 total |
| Website | [www.rotrally.com](http://www.rotrally.com) |

The **Republic of Texas Biker Rally (R. O. T Biker Rally)** is a large [motorcycle rally](/wiki/Motorcycle_rally "Motorcycle rally") in [Texas](/wiki/Texas "Texas") and the largest turnstile (ticketed admission) motorcycle rally in the United States. Similar events in Sturgis, South Dakota, and Daytona Beach, Florida, draw more attendees, but they are not ticketed events. A simple majority of attendees arrive on Harley-Davidson motorcycles, but the rally is open to everyone and all brands of bikes. Many attendees arrive in motor homes and stay on the premises.[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*]

The four-day event is held on the first, second, or third Thursday-through-Sunday after [Memorial Day](/wiki/Memorial_Day "Memorial Day") at the [Travis County Exposition Center](/wiki/Luedecke_Arena "Luedecke Arena") on the east edge of [Austin](/wiki/Austin,_Texas "Austin, Texas"). The City of Austin blocks off the downtown area for a massive biker street party on [Congress Avenue](/wiki/Congress_Avenue "Congress Avenue") on Friday night. The first R. O. T. Rally was held in 1995, continued to 2019 & will resume in 2021. It constitutes one of the largest annual tourist events in Central Texas, with an estimated economic impact of 30–35,000,000 dollars per year.

The event has drawn as many as 35,000 paying customers to the event grounds. City officials have estimated that the Friday night street party downtown draws as many as 200,000 spectators thus making it one of the largest motorcycle rallies of any kind in the country.[[1]](#cite_note-Perry-1)[[2]](#cite_note-kvue-2)[[3]](#cite_note-auschr-3)[[4]](#cite_note-4)

There was no rally in 2020 on grounds of [COVID-19 pandemic](/wiki/COVID-19_pandemic "COVID-19 pandemic").

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/a/a8/Heaven_Below.jpg/250px-Heaven_Below.jpg)](/wiki/File:Heaven_Below.jpg)

[Heaven Below](/wiki/Heaven_Below "Heaven Below") performing at the Republic of Texas Biker Rally

Musical entertainers who have appeared at the rally include: [Willie Nelson](/wiki/Willie_Nelson "Willie Nelson"), [Waylon Jennings](/wiki/Waylon_Jennings "Waylon Jennings"), [Jerry Jeff Walker](/wiki/Jerry_Jeff_Walker "Jerry Jeff Walker"), [Jerry Lee Lewis](/wiki/Jerry_Lee_Lewis "Jerry Lee Lewis"), [Charlie Daniels](/wiki/Charlie_Daniels "Charlie Daniels"), [George Thoroughgood](/wiki/George_Thorogood "George Thorogood"), [Kid Rock](/wiki/Kid_Rock "Kid Rock"), [Hank Williams Jr](/wiki/Hank_Williams_Jr. "Hank Williams Jr."), [Brett Michaels](/wiki/Bret_Michaels "Bret Michaels"), [Ted Nugent](/wiki/Ted_Nugent "Ted Nugent"), [Joan Jett](/wiki/Joan_Jett "Joan Jett"), [Grand Funk Railroad](/wiki/Grand_Funk_Railroad "Grand Funk Railroad"), [The Guess Who](/wiki/The_Guess_Who "The Guess Who"), [Edgar Winter](/wiki/Edgar_Winter "Edgar Winter"), [Steppenwolf](/wiki/Steppenwolf_(band) "Steppenwolf (band)"), [the Georgia Satellites](/wiki/The_Georgia_Satellites "The Georgia Satellites"), [Joe Ely](/wiki/Joe_Ely "Joe Ely"), [David Allan Coe](/wiki/David_Allan_Coe "David Allan Coe"), [Ray Wylie Hubbard](/wiki/Ray_Wylie_Hubbard "Ray Wylie Hubbard"), [Asleep At The Wheel](/wiki/Asleep_at_the_Wheel "Asleep at the Wheel"), [Mitch Ryder](/wiki/Mitch_Ryder "Mitch Ryder"), and many more. Additional attractions typically include motorcycle stunt shows, celebrity bike builders, stage acts, and acres of motorcycle related vendors.[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*]
